response.justification: Bogdan is a strong technical generalist with 15+ years of experience across distributed systems, multiple languages, and Staff-level roles at Google and Meta, which satisfies the seniority bar. However, the resume contains zero evidence of experimentation platform engineering, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, rollout-risk management, or growth measurement systems — which are the explicit core deliverables of this Principal role. His depth is in full-stack product development and low-latency micro-services, not in the specialized growth/experimentation domain this position demands at IC6 scale.
strengths: 15+ years of multi-language engineering (C/C++, Java, TypeScript, DLang) including high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of req/sec at Sociomantic
Staff-level IC tenure at Google and Meta demonstrates proven seniority and cross-functional collaboration at large-scale orgs
Strong testing culture, TDD advocacy, and open-source platform ownership (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) show disciplined engineering fundamentals
concerns: No experimentation platform experience anywhere in the resume — no A/B testing, feature flags, experiment assignment, bias detection, or rollout automation
No telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or observability work mentioned — a core technical requirement of the role
No growth engineering background — no evidence of funnel analysis, acquisition metrics, experiment quality frameworks, or data science partnership on measurement systems

key_factors.factor: Staff IC seniority at top-tier companies
